title: The J.M. Smucker (SJM) Rewards Investors With Dividend Hike
text: The J.M. Smucker (SJM) rewards shareholders by raising the quarterly dividend. The company is progressing with core priorities.

title: Smucker raises dividend by 3% to $1.02 a share
text: The J.M. Smucker Co. SJM, -0.75% said late Friday that its board of directors has approved a 3% dividend increase to $1.02, from 99 cents a share, to $1.02 a share. The dividend will be paid Sept.

title: Why Is Smucker (SJM) Up 3.7% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Smucker (SJM) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: 4 ‘Strong Buy' Stocks With Dividend Hikes Expected This Week
text: After years of a low interest rate environment (though those rates now are trending higher faster), many investors have turned to equities, not only for the growth potential but also for solid and dependable dividends, which help to provide an income stream.

title: Smucker's (SJM) Pricing & Coffee Business Solid, Costs High
text: The J.M. Smucker (SJM) has been benefiting from the recovery in the Away from Home division, a solid coffee business and pricing amid the rising cost inflation.
